title: Living in Boulder Vlog 12 -  3 -  2018: Feeling good, dinner at moms

transcript.text: Hey welcome to kyle pound's daily vlog um so yesterday I did my fifth ride
Um I think that was ride number five um and I uh I rode 100 miles oh shit um
And um I uh in uh six hours and 29 minutes and my fourth ride was 100 miles in six hours and 36
Minutes and um I uh so I was I guess I was seven minutes faster so yeah I'm gonna keep doing it I
Like this 100 miles a day thing um ride 100 miles a day and uh I can I'll I mean it'll be as clear as
Day how strong I am and how I'm getting stronger if I just keep it up and I don't interfere I don't
Throw anything else in the mix you know like other sports and you know I don't get injured I just keep
Going because maybe I'll I'm super curious maybe I'll get weaker or maybe I'll get stronger and then
And then like at one point I'll suddenly get stronger you know so um so yeah I started
Riding and then last night I'm on a nocturnal schedule and then I kind of had insomnia for a
Few hours for a long time actually just laying there um I could have ridden more actually after
I was done I was thinking oh maybe I should go 113 miles because that's the iron man distance but uh
But then that would kind of skew the science I think 100 miles is enough for me um I like the round
Number and I need the extra time in the day to do other things to get caught up with my life um
Because I sleep so much because I have insomnia and then I slept until late and then I went to the
Store I had uh tires on my bike that were uh the original tires that I bought the bike with and I
Think there were like actual road tires and so my my trainer was chewing them up and there was
Little bits of rubber all over the floor that I had to vacuum yesterday and I see them here I have
A little special rug on there so um yeah I think I'm gonna go ahead and ride tonight hopefully it
Won't pop because I don't know if I have extra tubes I want to be able to ride all night long but
Yeah it's got it's it's got holes in it in two different places I hope there's like a bead
Underneath there or something because I'm kind of too lazy to put the uh the new tire on I'll do that
When I get up tomorrow so I got up yeah I went to the bike shop got a tire built specifically for
Bike trainers and then I got another tire for the road so I would eventually like to like to score
Some other wheels somehow um oh I applied I don't know if I mentioned this but I applied to the uh the
Very highest I did mention it the very highest tier like the best ads I can't remember what they're
Called but the best ads on youtube or on the website for my website so I have enough hits so
We'll see if I get accepted in the program and then I could make some money because I get 385 000
Page views a month on my website and for that place you only need a thousand hundred thousand
So um but yeah um I uh so then I went over to my mom's house and she wanted me to watch an episode
Of the outlander but she invited me over to have some soup so I had some soup really good vegetable
Soup with uh shrimp I think my uh strategy for riding the bike 100 miles I really like this 100
Miles a day thing you know for the scientific factor but also for the training it's not over
Training and it's also good exercise my knee feels fine when I walk upstairs my legs aren't burning
Like I feel normal I'm not overcooked which is good I think it's not good to overcook yourself when
You're at the very beginning um
